ab: Piondoankayan no picodadan anini romi’ad, mipalowad ko picodadan to adihayay a salifet.
ch: 今天是學校的運動會，學校舉辦了許多競賽。
en: Today was the school's sports day, and the school organized many competitions.

ab: Ira ko masasolotay, saliwa’ay mimali, comikayay, masakeroay ato mipana’ay.
ch: 有拔河、足球、跑步、跳舞和射箭。
en: There were tug of war, soccer, running, dancing, and archery.
I participated in the running competition.

ab: Oya kacomikay ako i, matolo’ay kako, ta:no remes sanay ko tosor ako.
ch: 當我跑步的時候，我跌倒了，膝蓋流了很多血。
en: When I was running, I fell down, and my knees were bleeding.

ab: Nikaorira lomowad kako, misingto tala’ayaw comikay.
ch: 但我站起來，繼續向前跑。
en: But I stood up and continued running forward.

ab: Tangasa kako i paherekan i lipahak maemin ko mikiaraway.
ch: 我到終點時所有觀眾都很開心。
en: Everyone was happy when I reached the finish line.

ab: Talacowa caay pakaala to sakacecay ngangan, nikaorira maolah kako, nawhani malaheci ako konini a lifet.
ch: 雖然沒有獲得第一名，但我很高興，因為我完成了比賽。
en: Although I didn't get first place, I'm glad because I completed the race.
